summary: Focused retest of the 2 fixes from iteration 178: (1) ManagedFunds 'Invest in Fund' crash and (2) Strategic Planning net worth mismatch. Both PASS. ManagedFunds now adds a new row safely (TEST Growth Fund => 40,000 units @ $1.25, toast 'Investment added to portfolio' fires, NO TypeError, count 5 -> 6, ErrorBoundary not triggered). Strategic Planning header now reads Net Worth $9,610,000 and Total Assets $11,672,000 — identical to Investments Overview. One remaining minor cosmetic bug flagged below (return field name mismatch in new fund object).

ui_bugs.issue: New fund object sets ytdReturn/oneYearReturn/threeYearReturn/fiveYearReturn (L147-150) but the Portfolio row renders fund.return1y / return3y / return5y — so freshly added funds display empty '%' for 1Y/3Y/5Y. No crash (undefined coerces to ''), purely cosmetic. Align field names: either store as return1y/return3y/return5y OR read from oneYearReturn/threeYearReturn/fiveYearReturn in the JSX.

acceptance_criteria_results.managed_funds_invest_dialog_no_crash: PASS - invest-btn opens dialog, fund-name + fund-purchase accept input, confirm-invest adds row. Toast 'Investment added to portfolio' shown. No ErrorBoundary. Fund count 5 -> 6. Last row shows '40,000 units @ $1.25' and purchase value $50,000.
acceptance_criteria_results.strategic_planning_totals_match_investme: PASS - /strategic-planning header: Net Worth $9,610,000, Total Assets $11,672,000, Total Debt $2,062,000, Annual Income $582,510, Annual Tax $162,224. Values now match /investments Overview (Thompson Family client) via portfolio.summary.{totalAssets,totalDebt,netWorth} pass-through.
acceptance_criteria_results.regression_prior_iter178_flows: NOT RE-EXECUTED (time-boxed to the 2 requested fixes). Iter178 already confirmed Bonds/Cash/Crypto/Property Add+Delete + /crm + /profile redirects all PASS. Code for those pages unchanged in this iteration per review_request.

action_items: (LOW) ManagedFunds: align return field names between investInFund() newFund object (ytdReturn/oneYearReturn/threeYearReturn/fiveYearReturn) and Portfolio tab render (fund.return1y/return3y/return5y) so freshly added funds show 0% instead of empty '%'.
(Carry-over) Recharts 'width(-1) and height(-1)' warnings still logged on /investments (multiple chart containers with 0 width at mount). Non-blocking.
(Carry-over) emergent-main.js DataCloneError postMessage spam — environmental, not app code.
critical_code_review_comments: ManagedFunds fix is good (units/unitPrice defaults included), but the naming inconsistency noted above means the fresh row's 1Y/3Y/5Y columns look 'empty' rather than '0%' or '+0%'. Pattern worth a quick pass across other newly-wired add-item flows (Bonds, Cash, Crypto, Property) to confirm no other field-name drift between state shape and JSX readers.

StrategicPlanning currentNetWorth useMemo now correctly prefers portfolio.summary totals when present (?? nullish coalescing) and falls back to calculated values — good single-source-of-truth pattern. Consider applying the same pattern to other pages that compute Net Worth independently (e.g., Dashboard, Retirement Confidence) if they also diverge.
test_credentials: None — compliance bypass via localStorage wealth_command_compliance_v5=permanent; adviser_mode=true; selected_client={id:'thompson_family'}.
seed_data_creation: Ephemeral in-memory: one 'TEST Growth Fund' row added to ManagedFunds during test; not persisted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 179 verified the 2 iter178 carry-over fixes (ManagedFunds crash + Strategic Planning totals mismatch). Both PASS. One remaining LOW-priority cosmetic bug: new ManagedFunds fund rows show empty '1Y: %' '3Y: %' '5Y: %' because the new fund object uses oneYearReturn/threeYearReturn/fiveYearReturn while JSX reads return1y/return3y/return5y. No functional regressions. Carry-over non-blocking issues unchanged: /api/documents 503, /notifications 404, Recharts width(-1) warnings, emergent-main.js DataCloneError spam.
rca of the issue: Fix #1 (ManagedFunds): investInFund() now explicitly sets units (derived from purchaseValue/unitPrice=1.25) and unitPrice=1.25 on the new fund object (ManagedFunds.jsx L135-146). Render at L367 no longer hits undefined.toLocaleString(). Verified live: 40,000 units @ $1.25 displayed. Fix #2 (Strategic Planning): currentNetWorth useMemo (StrategicPlanning.jsx L219-239) now uses portfolio.summary.totalAssets ?? (sum of parts), totalDebt ?? propertyDebt, netWorth ?? (assets-debt). Since portfolio.summary provides canonical totals for the selected client, the header tiles now align with Investments Overview. Verified live: $9,610,000 / $11,672,000 / $2,062,000.
